name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state, turn

Init == 
    /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
    /\ turn \in 1..N

Next == 
    \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ state[i] = "idle"
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]
        /\ turn' = (turn % N) + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

TypeOK == 
    /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
    /\ turn \in 1..N

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, messages



TypeOK ==
  /\ participants \in [1..N -> {"INIT", "PREPARED", "COMMITTED", "ABORTED"}]
  /\ coordinator \in {"INIT", "PREPARING", "COMMITTING", "ABORTING", "COMMITTED", "ABORTED"}
  /\ messages \in [1..N -> {"", "PREPARE", "VOTE_YES", "VOTE_NO", "COMMIT", "ABORT"}]

Init ==
  /\ participants = [i \in 1..N |-> "INIT"]
  /\ coordinator = "INIT"
  /\ messages = [i \in 1..N |-> ""]

Prepare ==
  /\ coordinator = "INIT"
  /\ coordinator' = "PREPARING"
  /\ messages' = [i \in 1..N |-> "PREPARE"]
  /\ UNCHANGED participants

VoteYes ==
  /\ coordinator = "PREPARING"
  /\ \A i \in 1..N : messages[i] = "PREPARE"
  /\ messages' = [i \in 1..N |-> "VOTE_YES"]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<coordinator, participants>>

VoteNo ==
  /\ coordinator = "PREPARING"
  /\ \A i \in 1..N : messages[i] = "PREPARE"
  /\ messages' = [i \in 1..N |-> "VOTE_NO"]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<coordinator, participants>>

Commit ==
  /\ coordinator = "COMMITTING"
  /\ \A i \in 1..N : messages[i] = "COMMIT"
  /\ coordinator' = "COMMITTED"
  /\ UNCHANGED participants

Abort ==
  /\ coordinator = "ABORTING"
  /\ \A i \in 1..N : messages[i] = "ABORT"
  /\ coordinator' = "ABORTED"
  /\ UNCHANGED participants

Next ==
  \/ Prepare
  \/ VoteYes
  \/ VoteNo
  \/ Commit
  \/ Abort

Spec ==
  Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator, messages>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Forks: a set of fork indices {0, 1, ..., N-1} *)
Forks == {0, 1, ..., N-1}

(* States: a function from philosopher indices to {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"} *)
States == [i \in Forks |-> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

(* Initial state: all forks are free, all philosophers are thinking *)
Init == forks = Forks /\ states = [i \in Forks |-> "thinking"]

(* Helper: determine the left and right fork indices for philosopher i *)
LeftFork(i) == IF i = 0 THEN N-1 ELSE i-1
RightFork(i) == IF i = N-1 THEN 0 ELSE i+1

(* Action: philosopher i picks up both forks if they are free and philosopher is hungry *)
PickUp(i) == 
    /\ states[i] = "hungry"
    /\ forks = Forks \ {LeftFork(i), RightFork(i)}
    /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
    /\ forks' = forks \ {LeftFork(i), RightFork(i)}

(* Action: philosopher i puts down both forks and becomes hungry *)
PutDown(i) == 
    /\ states[i] = "eating"
    /\ forks' = forks \cup {LeftFork(i), RightFork(i)}
    /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]

(* Action: philosopher i thinks *)
Think(i) == 
    /\ states[i] = "thinking"
    /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
    /\ forks' = forks

(* Next action: any philosopher can think, pick up forks, or put down forks *)
Next == \E i \in Forks : 
    PickUp(i) \/ PutDown(i) \/ Think(i)

(* Type invariant: forks is a subset of Forks, states is a function from Forks to {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"} *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ forks \subseteq Forks
    /\ states \in [Forks -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

(* TypeOK ensures num is a sequence of N integers, flag is a sequence of N booleans *)
TypeOK == /\ num \in Seq(N)
          /\ flag \in Seq(N)

(* Helper functions *)
Less(i, j) == /\ flag[i] /\ flag[j]
              /\ (num[i] < num[j] \/ (num[i] = num[j] /\ i < j))

MaxNum == IF N = 0 THEN 0 ELSE Max(num)

(* Initial state: all flag false, all num 0 *)
Init == /\ num = <<0, .., 0>>  (* N zeros *)
        /\ flag = <<FALSE, .., FALSE>>

(* Next action: process i can either be choosing a number or executing critical section *)
Next == \E i \in 1..N :
        \/ (* Choosing phase *)
           /\ flag' = Subst(flag, i, TRUE)
           /\ num' = Subst(num, i, MaxNum + 1)
        \/ (* Critical section *)
           /\ flag' = Subst(flag, i, FALSE)
           /\ num' = Subst(num, i, 0)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

(* Mutual exclusion invariant: at most one process in critical section *)
MutualExclusion == \A i, j \in 1..N : i /= j => ~(flag[i] /\ flag[j])

(* Safety invariant: if a process is in critical section, no other process has a smaller number *)
Safety == \A i, j \in 1..N : i /= j => ~(flag[i] /\ flag[j] /\ Less(j, i))

(* Liveness invariant: if a process is choosing a number, eventually it will finish choosing *)
Liveness == \A i \in 1..N : flag[i] => <> (num[i] = 0)

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* Type invariants *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
    /\ head \in 1..K
    /\ tail \in 1..K
    /\ size \in 0..K

(* Initial state: empty queue *)
Init == 
    /\ q = <<>>
    /\ head = 1
    /\ tail = 1
    /\ size = 0

(* Producer action: enqueue *)
Enqueue == 
    /\ size < K
    /\ head' = head
    /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
    /\ size' = size + 1
    /\ q' = Append(q, 1)  (* placeholder value *)

(* Consumer action: dequeue *)
Dequeue == 
    /\ size > 0
    /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
    /\ tail' = tail
    /\ size' = size - 1
    /\ q' = Tail(q)

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == Enqueue \/ Dequeue

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS NULL, ServerId

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state



TypeOK == 
  /\ currentTerm \in Int
  /\ state \in [ServerId -> {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}]
  /\ votedFor \in [ServerId -> ServerId]

Init == 
  /\ currentTerm = 0
  /\ state = [s \in ServerId |-> "Follower"]
  /\ votedFor = [s \in ServerId |-> NULL]

(* Next action: state transitions *)
Next == 
  \E s \in ServerId :
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Follower"]
    /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
    /\ votedFor' = votedFor



Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>
